REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFFS JOEL TATE, DAISY TATE'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED AS FOLLOWS: LINTON MARTIN IS ORDERED TO EXECUTE A QUITCLAIM DEED WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY ORDER. IF LINTON MARTIN FAILS TO COMPLY, JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST LINTON MARTIN AND A. ELAINE MARTIN. ATTORNEY'S FEES GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,150 AGAINST LINTON MARTIN TO BE PAID WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. PLAINTIFF MAY APPEAR EX-PARTE TO OBTAIN JUDGMENT UPON EXPIRATION OF 15 DAYS AND PROPER NOTICE. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-05-2018 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN TRIAL SETTING. MATTHEW HAULK, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFFS. LAWRENCE SCANCARELLI, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS. HAVING NO OPPOSITION BY DEFENDANTS, THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 36(A). THE TRIAL DATE IS 7/16/18 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 WITH A LAST DAY OF 8/3/18. LAST DAY FOR HEARING SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION MOTIONS IS 7/12/18. FACT DISCOVERY CUT-OFF DATE IS 6/29/18. EXPERT DISCOVERY CUT-OFF DATE IS 7/13/18. PLAINTIFF DEMANDS JURY TRIAL. JURY FEES SHALL BE POSTED NO LATER THAN 4:00PM TODAY. PARTIES AGREE TO MORE DETAILED TERMS SET FORTH ON THE ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RICHARD ULMER; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
